name: Crockpot Chicken Cordon Bleu
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten chicken breasts with a wooden mallet.
2. Cover each half breast with a slice of cheese and ham (thinly sliced ham). Secure with toothpicks.
3. In a skillet, brown the chicken in hot margarine.
4. Arrange the chicken in the crockpot.
5. Combine the soup and remaining ingredients in a bowl and pour over the chicken.
6. Cover the pot and cook on low for 4-5 hours.
7. Serve on watercress if desired.
